---
title: ""
---

## Teaching

::: cv-entry
[2025]{.cv-year}
[Social Groups and the Formation of Political Attitudes]{.cv-title}
[Master's Seminar in Political Science at Aarhus University with 24 participants]{.cv-sub}
[Average student satisfaction: 4.5/5]{.cv-sub-sub}
:::

::: cv-entry
[2024]{.cv-year}
[General Political Science]{.cv-title}
[Bachelors course in Political Science at Aarhus University with 25x2 participants]{.cv-sub}
[Average student satisfaction: 5/5]{.cv-sub-sub}
:::

 

::: cv-entry
[2020, 2021]{.cv-year}
[Methods II - Quantitative Methods]{.cv-title}
[TA in the study cafe, "Metodevagten"]{.cv-sub}
:::
